description: Mockito Scala provides a Scala-friendly wrapper around Mockito with idiomatic syntax for creating mocks, stubbing behavior, verifying interactions, and capturing arguments. The org.mockito:mockito-scala_2.13 artifact publishes the core Scala 2.13 JVM API and integrates with Mockito Core while leaving ScalaTest, Specs2, Cats, and Scalaz helpers in separate companion artifacts.
